name: polymarket-wallet-data
title: Polymarket Wallet On-Chain Activity
description: On-chain USDC and CTF (Conditional Token Framework) transfer data for 99 active Polymarket wallets on Polygon. Covers USDC flows (deposits, withdrawals, exchange interactions) and CTF token movements (trades, redemptions, merges/splits). Includes PnL rankings and strategy analysis.

sources.title: Polygon PoS chain (USDC Transfer events via Polygonscan/RPC)
Polymarket CTF Exchange contracts on Polygon

resources.name: usdc-transfers
resources.description: USDC transfer events for 99 wallets on Polygon. ~30M rows total. One parquet file per wallet address. Covers native USDC and PoS-bridged USDC.

fields.name: from_label
fields.description: Label for sender (e.g. 'external', known contract name)

resources.name: ctf-transfers
resources.description: CTF (Conditional Token Framework) ERC-1155 transfer events for 129 wallets. ~17M rows total. One parquet file per wallet address. Covers trades, redemptions, merges, and splits.

fields.name: event_type
fields.description: Type of CTF event: trade_in, trade_out, redeem, merge, split, etc.

fields.name: token_id
fields.description: ERC-1155 token ID (maps to a specific market outcome)

resources.name: deep-drill
resources.description: Deep-dive USDC flow analysis for 8 selected wallets. JSON files with detailed transaction-level breakdown.

resources.name: pnl-rankings
resources.description: PnL rankings for tracked wallets based on realized and unrealized profits.

resources.name: strategy-analysis
resources.description: Strategy classification and analysis for tracked wallets.

resources.name: market-makers
resources.description: Identified market maker wallets and their activity patterns.

resources.name: target-wallets
resources.description: List of 99 target wallet addresses selected for analysis.

resources.name: resolutions
resources.description: Market resolution data used for PnL calculations.
